"vulnerabilities": [{"cve": "CVE-2026-42052", "ids": [{"system_name": "SUSE CVE Page", "text": "https://www.suse.com/security/cve/CVE-2026-42052"}], "notes": [{"category": "general", "text": "Beets is the media library management system. Prior to version 2.10.0, the bundled web UI uses Underscore template interpolation mode <%= ... %> for untrusted metadata fields. In this runtime, <%= ... %> is raw insertion and HTML escaping is only performed by <%- ... %>. Rendered output is then inserted with .html(...), allowing attacker-controlled markup to become active DOM. This issue has been patched in version 2.10.0.", "title": "CVE description"}], "product_status": {"recommended": ["openSUSE Leap 16.0:beets-2.2.0-bp160.2.1.noarch"]}, "references": [{"category": "external", "summary": "CVE-2026-42052", "url": "https://www.suse.com/security/cve/CVE-2026-42052"}, {"category": "external", "summary": "SUSE Bug 1263988 for CVE-2026-42052", "url": "https://bugzilla.suse.com/1263988"}], "remediations": [{"category": "vendor_fix", "details": "To install this SUSE Security Update use the SUSE recommended installation methods like YaST online_update or "zypper patch".
", "product_ids": ["openSUSE Leap 16.0:beets-2.2.0-bp160.2.1.noarch"]}], "threats": [{"category": "impact", "date": "2026-07-20T14:36:24Z", "details": "moderate"}], "title": "CVE-2026-42052"}]}

fixed_versions: To install this SUSE Security Update use the SUSE recommended installation methods like YaST online_update or "zypper patch".
